title: Apple’s New Siri AI Is Now Gemini
summary: Apple announced a rebuilt Siri AI at WWDC 2026 with personal context, screen awareness, Visual Intelligence, writing tools, and cross-device integration. The new Siri reportedly relies on Google Gemini and will not launch in the EU on iPhones and iPads due to regulatory constraints.
writeup: The video covers Apple's WWDC 2026 announcement of a rebuilt Siri that adds personal context, screen awareness, Visual Intelligence, writing tools, and cross-device integration. It reports that the new Siri relies on Google Gemini, a notable shift for a company that has emphasized in-house and on-device AI. Key takeaways: the assistant blends on-device processing with cloud integration and context management, and it will not launch in the EU on iPhones and iPads because of regulatory constraints.
